title: SSUHS GNM Exam Date 2026 Out

detail.title: SSUHS GNM Exam Date 2026 Out
detail.short_info: SSUHS GNM Exam Date 2026 announced. The entrance exam will be held on 28 June 2026. Check application dates, exam timing, syllabus, and download notification PDF at ssuhs.ac.in.

content.text: Srimanta Sankaradeva University of Health Sciences (SSUHS) has officially released the GNM Exam Date 2026 for the entrance examination. The SSUHS GNM Entrance Exam 2026 is scheduled for 28 June 2026. This exam is conducted for admission into General Nursing and Midwifery (GNM) courses in government and private nursing institutes across Assam for the academic session 2026-2027.

The official notification is available on the university website ssuhs.ac.in. Students can check complete details including application schedule, exam pattern, and important instructions from the prospectus.
Download SSUHS GNM Exam Date 2026 PDF

links.text: Download SSUHS GNM Exam Date 2026 PDF

content.text: The SSUHS GNM Exam Date 2026 brings good news for aspiring nursing students in Assam. The entrance test is set for June 2026, with online applications opening soon. This page provides complete information about the exam schedule, eligibility, and download links.

rows: Srimanta Sankaradeva University of Health Sciences (SSUHS)

sections.heading: SSUHS GNM 2026 Subject Wise Exam Schedule

content.text: The SSUHS GNM Exam Date 2026 is a single-day entrance test covering subjects from Class 10 level. The question paper will be based on English, Mathematics, and General Science. Candidates must prepare according to the prescribed syllabus mentioned in the official notification.

sections.heading: How to Download SSUHS GNM Exam Date 2026 Notification

content.text: Students can easily download the official SSUHS GNM Exam Date 2026 notification and prospectus from the university website. Follow these simple steps:

items: Visit the official website of SSUHS at https://ssuhs.ac.in.
Navigate to the "Notices" or "Entrance Examination" section on the homepage.
Look for the link titled "GNM Entrance Examination 2026 Notification" or similar.
Click on the link to open the PDF file.
Download and save the notification PDF for future reference.
Print a copy if needed for quick access during application and preparation.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in SSUHS GNM Exam Date 2026 Notification

content.text: The official SSUHS GNM notification contains all essential information for candidates applying for the 2026 entrance exam. It provides clear guidelines for the entire admission process.

items: Important dates for application, admit card, and examination
Eligibility criteria including educational qualification and age limit
Examination pattern, total marks, and duration
List of exam centres across Assam
Application fee and payment method
Reservation policy and seat matrix details
Syllabus and recommended study materials
Instructions for appearing in the OMR-based test.
